headline: Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?
summary: Pope Leo XIV's encyclical on AI might have been partially AI-written. An analysis found paragraphs with 40-100% AI-generated content. The popular AI detector Pangram was used for the assessment.

headline: NASA’s permanent Moon base plans start with three missions this year
summary: NASA announced upcoming lunar missions to the Moon's South Pole. These pave the way for the 2028 crewed Artemis landing. Three initial Moon Base missions are the first of over a dozen planned.

headline: Google Health is here, but a lot of people want their Fitbit app back instead
summary: Google Health has officially replaced the Fitbit app. The change coincided with the launch of the new Fitbit Air. Many users have expressed confusion and frustration with the new app.

headline: GE’s nugget ice maker is nearly half off if you buy it refurbished
summary: Woot is selling a refurbished GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker. It's priced at $264.99, nearly half off its new retail price. The deal runs until June 3rd and includes a 90-day warranty.

headline: The UGREEN Maxidok Is a Behemoth of a Thunderbolt 5 Dock With 17 Total Ports and Triple Monitor Support
summary: UGREEN introduces the Maxidok, a new Thunderbolt 5 dock. It boasts 17 total ports and supports triple monitor setups. The dock is noted for its competitive pricing.

headline: Pressure Review: Brendan Fraser and Andrew Scott Shine in a Tense, High-Stakes D-Day Thriller
summary: Pressure is a tense D-Day thriller with strong performances. Brendan Fraser portrays General Eisenhower, Andrew Scott plays meteorologist James Stagg. The film is praised for its historical detail and compelling story.

headline: The New Dungeon Crawler Carl Book Has a LEGO Joke Fellow Brick Builders Will Appreciate
summary: A new 'Dungeon Crawler Carl' book has been released. It contains a specific joke related to LEGO. Fellow brick builders are expected to appreciate this detail.

headline: The Recertified Sonos Memorial Day Sale Has Huge Savings on Subs, Speakers, and Soundbars
summary: Sonos is holding a Memorial Day sale on recertified products. Discounts are available on various subs, speakers, and soundbars. The Sonos Arc Ultra and Sonos Sub 4 reached their lowest prices this year.

headline: Energy bills to rise for millions as impact of Iran war hits
summary: Energy bills are set to increase for millions of households. The rise is linked to the ongoing Iran war's impact. A typical household will pay an extra £221 annually under the new price cap.

headline: Labour has 'no coherent plan' for country, says Blair
summary: Former Labour PM Tony Blair criticized Sir Keir Starmer's Labour government. Blair believes Labour is in the 'wrong position' for the next election. He stated the party lacks a coherent plan for the country.

headline: Body found in search for boy, 12, missing in river as heatwave continues
summary: A 12-year-old boy went missing in a river during a heatwave. Police and fire crews launched a major search operation. A body was recovered on Tuesday night.

headline: Nasa unveils next steps to build permanent Moon base
summary: NASA has unveiled its plans for establishing a permanent Moon base. The strategy includes deploying hopping drones and roving vehicles. These steps are part of a broader vision for lunar habitation.
